title: Cobblemon Lyoko's Monsters Pack
description: An addon for Cobblemon that adds monsters from Code Lyoko
body:
**This addon adds Monster from the TV series Code Lyoko**
![Splashart](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f982d6b58106bceb9001a9c5cdffa4b3ba9f25f.png)

#### There's a document where you can find every information you need [HERE](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1dGT2Hr18pryKduTzDlt7-nylhvPrzvK7/edit?usp=sharing&ouid=102643294401709778959&rtpof=true&sd=true)

### **Monsters introduced so far:**
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

### **Version 1.0 (Cobblemon 1.6.1)**
- **Krab** - Dark/Ground
- **Megatank** - Dark/Steel
- **Blok** - Dark/Ice
- **Kankrelat** - Dark/Bug
- **Hornet** - Dark/Flying

</details>


### Common Q&A:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**If you need more help you can find me in the official Cobblemon Discord Server.**

**Q** : I have issue with the addon, I'm using **-insert modpack name-**.
**A** : I'm sorry but I can't help you for issue connected to a modpack, I don't have enough time to check if my addon works with every modpack out there.

**Q** : I need some information about a pokemon, can you help me?
**A** :**[HERE](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1dGT2Hr18pryKduTzDlt7-nylhvPrzvK7/edit?usp=sharing&ouid=102643294401709778959&rtpof=true&sd=true)** you can find every information you need

**Q** : I would like to add this addon in a modpack, can I add to it?
**A** : Sure, well I would also like to know which modpacks have my addon in (sometimes I play minecraft too, so...)

**Q** : Hi, I'm an admin of **-insert server name-**, we would like to add your addon in **-insert some method to earn money from players-**
**A** : Uh uh, you want to use a free addon to earn from. If you want to add it then **PAY ME** (To be clear: I don't earn a single penny from this addon and **no one is allowed to use this addon in public server without my permission**).

"but these are not pokemon ☝️😬 " yeah and remember two things:
1. Pokemon literally means "pocket monsters" ☝️🥸 
2. This pack is made for fun and practice, not to be coherent with pokemon style, duh.

</details>

### Credits:
- Every model and animation is made by [Doctor_X_Art (me)](https://www.instagram.com/doctor_x_art/)
- The designs are not mine and all rights are reserved to their own owners, I just made the models and animations.
